name: Goushi Asougi
description:
A male player who is Pitohui's acquaintance and longtime friend. Asougi Goushi, known as M in Gun Gale Online, is one of the main characters of the Sword Art Online Alternative "Gun Gale Online" spin-off series.

He is a giant man, over 190 centimeters tall, and is good at medium to long-range combat, and is especially good at sniping. He is calm, has excellent strategy planning skills, and serves as the team's staff officer.
